title: SCP-017, Shadow Person
description: A shadow in the darkness can't be trusted. It watches, it hunts...
body:
Shadow Person adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-017, also known as Shadow Person.


SCP-017 is a small, humanoid anomaly, spawning exclusively in dark areas. It stalks nearby players and emits black smoke particle. Exposure to light causes it to emit even more smoke particles and extinguish nearby torches. When angered, SCP-017 reveals glowing eyes and intensifies its smoke output. Attacking a player causes the entity to grow in size, surrounding its victim in smoke and inflicting multiple debuffs including Blindness, Darkness, Slowness, Mining Fatigue, and Weakness. Though with it's low health, it deals high damage and regenerates if it kills an entity, shrinking back to its normal size.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-017 spawn?

SCP-017 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-017.

</details>



![SCP-017](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8734f3c3f5132c0bae6e894b9a0a802e81cae0a9_0.webp)

SCP-017 is a small, translucent humanoid figure. Its form constantly emits black smoke particles, which intensify under direct light and extinguishes nearby torches. Normally it keeps its distance, watching players with unnerving stillness. When a player gets to close to SCP017, its eyes will get visibility, and the smoke thickens around it. Upon attacking, SCP-017 increases in size, covering its target in dense smoke and inflicting a combination of crippling effects like Blindness, Darkness, Slowness, Mining Fatigue, and Weakness. It cannot swim and becomes invisible when submerged in water, with all smoke disappearing. Despite its low health, SCP-017 deals high damage and the ability to regenerate upon killing an entity making it a dangerous predator. Once fed, it returns to its smaller form, ready to stalk its next victim.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
